summary: Completed testing of sport booking system new features: regular user profile access and admin logo size settings. Regular users can now access Profilom menu and /profile page with full profile management. Admin logo size slider (24-120px) is properly implemented and appears when logo is uploaded.
passed_tests: Regular user can see and access Profilom button in header
Regular user can navigate to /profile page successfully
Profile page contains user profile form with name, email, phone fields
Profile page has password change section with current and new password fields
Admin button correctly hidden for regular users
Foglalásaim button visible for regular users
Backend API returns site_logo_size field in GET /api/settings
Backend API accepts site_logo_size updates in PUT /admin/settings
Logo size slider implemented with correct 24-120px range
Logo size slider only appears when logo is uploaded
Logo size slider has live preview functionality
Header height is dynamic based on logo size (calculated as max(64, logoSize + 24))
All backend API endpoints working correctly (30/30 tests passed)
